name: Trinary

unions.name: Trit
unions.comment:
Trinary logic has three truth values. The first letter is used
because `True` and `False` are reserved and `Maybe` is a default
import.

values.name: and
values.comment:
```
| Ōł¦     | True  | Maybe | False |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| True  | True  | Maybe | False |
| Maybe | Maybe | Maybe | False |
| False | False | False | False |
```

values.name: eq
values.comment:
```
| ŌēĪ     | True  | Maybe | False |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| True  | True  | Maybe | False |
| Maybe | Maybe | Maybe | Maybe |
| False | False | Maybe | True  |
```

values.name: implies
values.comment:
```
| ŌŖā     | True | Maybe | False |
|------ | ---- | ----- |------ |
| True  | True | Maybe | False |
| Maybe | True | Maybe | Maybe |
| False | True | True  | True  |
```

values.name: not
values.comment:
```
| ┬¼             |
| ------------- |
| True  | False |
| Maybe | Maybe |
| False | True  |
```

values.name: or
values.comment:
```
| Ōł©     | True | Maybe | False |
| ----- | ---- | ----- | ----- |
| True  | True | True  | True  |
| Maybe | True | Maybe | Maybe |
| False | True | Maybe | False |
```
